name: Mirae Asset MF - Mirae Asset Nifty EV and New Age Automotive ETF

index.name: Nifty EV and New Age Automotive Total Return Index
index.description: Nifty India EV & New Age Automotive Index covers companies participating across the electric vehicle value chain — OEMs (Tata Motors, M&M), EV charging infrastructure (Tata Power), battery manufacturers (Exide Energy, Amara Raja), EV components (Sona BLW, Bharat Forge, Uno Minda) and semiconductor/power electronics (Dixon Technologies, Kaynes Technology). India targets 30% EV penetration by 2030 under FAME III policy. ₹23,671 Cr allocated for EV subsidies. Battery storage economics improving as lithium prices decline 70% from 2023 peak — accelerating EV adoption.
